articles.title: Disillusionment and disbelief - thousands leave early with Spurs in freefall

articles.title: 'Howard Webb, where are you?' - How we can stop VAR ruining football
articles.summary: In his BBC Sport column, former Premier League boss Tony Pulis explains how VAR has become a monster, and why people in the game should be asked how to fix it.

articles.summary: Loved by their fans but loathed by rivals, free‑spending Wrexham are doing to the EFL what Chelsea did to European football in 2003.

articles.summary: After every round of Premier League matches this season, Troy Deeney gives us his team of the week. Do you agree with his choices?

articles.title: Liverpool weren't good enough against Wolves - Robertson
articles.summary: Defender Andy Robertson says Liverpool will have to play better in Friday's FA Cup tie against Wolves than they did in Tuesday's Premier League defeat by the same opposition.

articles.title: Williams loses eighth consecutive WTA singles match in Tour return
articles.summary: Venus Williams suffered another blow in her return to the BNP Paribas Open, falling in the first round 6-3, 6-7 (4-7), 6-1 to Diane Parry of France.

articles.title: Littler 'back to his best' in Cardiff - but will win provide Premier League catalyst?
articles.summary: Luke Littler's emphatic Premier League Darts victory in Cardiff could provide the catalyst the world No 1 has been searching for.

articles.summary: Nottingham Forest global head of football Edu is asked to stay away from the club's training ground.

articles.title: Man City close in on Anderson - Friday's gossip
articles.summary: Several Premier League clubs are chasing Fulham's Samuel Amissah, while Elliot Anderson is closing in on a move to Manchester City.

articles.summary: EFL clubs approve plans to expand the Championship play-offs from four to six teams for the 2026-27 season onwards.
